name: Web Scrape
description: Full-page web scraping and content extraction. Retrieves and cleans complete article text, blog posts, and documentation from any URL. Used when a URL's full content is needed beyond a search snippet.

capabilities: Extract full text content from any webpage
Convert JavaScript-rendered pages to clean markdown
Read articles, documentation, and web pages in full
data_sent: The URL you ask Izzie to scrape
scope.note: Only URLs sent to Firecrawl; they don't retain content per their privacy policy.

keys.label: Firecrawl API Key
keys.get_key_instructions: Sign up at firecrawl.dev → Dashboard → API Keys

installer.scope_summary: Fetches full page content from URLs via Firecrawl. Only URLs leave your device.
